---
title: "Home"
---

::: {.hero-banner}
<span class="prototype-badge">Prototype</span>

<div class="hero-title">Evidence Surveillance Hub</div>

<div class="hero-subtitle">
A prototype demonstrating how living evidence surveillance outputs can be published through a searchable, downloadable, and version-controlled platform.
</div>
:::
{{< include _recent-updates.md >}}
## Purpose

The Evidence Surveillance Hub provides a simple and sustainable approach for sharing rapidly updated outbreak literature.

[This prototype tests whether a GitHub repository and GitHub Pages website can provide a more accessible alternative to maintaining public evidence surveillance outputs through a spreadsheet alone.]{.highlight-text}

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.info-card}
### Searchable evidence

Users can browse and filter references by outbreak, study design, and year.
:::

::: {.info-card}
### Downloadable data

The underlying dataset can be downloaded as a CSV for reuse by researchers and public health professionals.
:::

::: {.info-card}
### Version history

GitHub tracks changes over time, supporting transparency and reproducibility.
:::

:::
::: {.status-box}
**Status:** Prototype under development. This website is not intended to represent a production repository or official evidence product.
:::
